sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: Fresh Tab
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:

workflow.name: Login Form
triggers: If the current URL is https://www.saucedemo.com/
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with id 'user-name'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with id 'password'

workflow.name: Add to cart
workflow.description: Logged in; now start adding things to cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains 'inventory.html'
If the button with id 'add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack' is visible

workflow.name: Open the cart
workflow.description: Added items to cart; now going to checkout
triggers: If the current URL contains 'inventory.html'
If the button with id 'remove-sauce-labs-backpack' is visible

workflow.name: Checking out
workflow.description: Viewing the cart; now checking out
triggers: If the current URL contains 'cart.html'

workflow.name: Entering checkout information
workflow.description: In checkout process; now entering information
triggers: If the current URL contains 'checkout-step-one.html'
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with id 'first-name'
Type 'User' into the input field with id 'last-name'
Type '12345' into the input field with id 'postal-code'

workflow.name: Finishing Checkout
triggers: If the current URL contains 'checkout-step-two.html'

workflow.name: Checkout confirmed
triggers: If the current URL contains 'checkout-complete.html'

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: Fresh Tab
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:

workflow.name: Login Form
workflow.description: Credential entry on the login page.
triggers: If the input field with id 'username' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the input field with id 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with id 'password'

workflow.name: Log out and go to dynamic controls
workflow.description: Logged in. Click Logout, then immediately navigate to dynamic_controls so the workflow never sits on the post-logout login page.
triggers: If the current URL contains '/secure'

workflow.name: Clicking enable button
workflow.description: On dynamic controls; the input is still disabled.
triggers: If the current URL contains '/dynamic_controls'
actions: Click the button in the form with aria-label 'enable', which is the second button on the page

workflow.name: Waiting for input to enable
workflow.description: Async gap while the input is being enabled. No actions on purpose.
triggers: If the text 'Wait for it...' is visible

workflow.name: Typing hello
workflow.description: Input is enabled; type into it and finish.
triggers: If the text 'enabled!' is visible
actions: Type 'hello' into the input field with type 'text'
Terminate: Typed hello into the enabled textbox.
